---
title: "Schedule"
params:
  dtype: background
  ptitle: FALSE
  pbackground: FALSE
output:
  html_document:  
    keep_md: TRUE 
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true    
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
#devtools::install_github("rasmusab/fullcalendar")

```

# Calendar
